name: office
prompt: {"subjects": [], "background_setting": "An empty modern office interior with rows of identical cubicles arranged in parallel lines. The floor is covered in low-pile gray carpet, and the partitions are upholstered in muted fabric panels. Drop ceiling tiles and recessed light fixtures span overhead.", "lighting": {"conditions": "Bright, evenly diffused overhead fluorescent and LED panel lighting throughout the office.", "direction": "Top-down from ceiling fixtures, with additional ambient daylight from the right-hand windows.", "shadows": "Soft, minimal shadows beneath desks and cubicle partitions due to the diffuse overhead light.", "illumination_effect": "Cool, neutral-white light producing a clean, professional, slightly clinical atmosphere."}, "aesthetics": {"composition": "Strong one-point linear perspective with a central vanishing point down the cubicle aisle.", "color_scheme": "Cool grays, whites, and beiges of office furniture contrasted with the muted green of trees through the windows.", "mood_atmosphere": "Quiet, organized, contemplative — a modern workspace at rest with no human activity."}, "cinematography": {"camera_motion": "Smooth, continuous dolly forward along the central aisle of the cubicle floor.", "framing": "Wide shot capturing the full depth and breadth of the office.", "camera_angle": "Eye-level for a standing person, parallel to the floor.", "depth_of_field": "Deep focus, with the full length of the office rendered sharply.", "focus": "Sharp focus throughout, emphasizing the orderly geometry of the workspace.", "lens_focal_length": "Wide-angle"}, "style_medium": "Live-action video", "artistic_style": "Realistic, documentary", "context": "Architectural walkthrough of an unoccupied office space", "actions": [{"time": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Camera glides forward smoothly through the empty office, passing rows of cubicles on both sides."}], "text_and_signage_elements": [], "segments": [{"segment_index": 0, "time_range": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Camera moves smoothly forward through the empty office aisle, with identical cubicles on both sides.", "key_changes": "Continuous forward camera motion; static environment with no people or moving objects.", "camera": "Dolly forward, wide-angle lens, eye-level"}], "transitions": [], "temporal_caption": "The scene opens with a wide-angle, eye-level shot of a modern empty office, rendered in deep focus. The camera begins a smooth, continuous dolly forward along the central aisle, gliding past parallel rows of cubicles on either side. Each cubicle contains a desk with a flat-panel monitor, keyboard, and an ergonomic chair tucked in, all arranged with precise uniformity. Bright fluorescent ceiling fixtures cast even, cool-white light across the gray carpet and fabric partitions, while a wall of floor-to-ceiling windows on the right admits ambient daylight, revealing mature trees outside. From 0.0 to 2.5 seconds, the camera continues its steady forward glide, the cubicles streaming past in clean one-point linear perspective with a strong central vanishing point. From 2.5 to 5.0 seconds, the camera maintains the same pace and trajectory as additional cubicles enter and exit the frame; no people are present, no objects move, and the lighting remains constant throughout the duration."}

name: city

name: mountain
prompt: {"subjects": [], "background_setting": "A majestic alpine landscape. In the background, jagged snow-capped peaks tower against a crisp, cloudless blue sky, their upper faces dusted in fresh white snow and their lower flanks revealing exposed gray rock. In the mid-ground, a dense forest of emerald-green pine trees blankets the rolling foothills and valley floor. A thin, ethereal mist clings to the lower slopes, weaving between the peaks and the treeline. The foreground reveals the green forest canopy textured by sunlight.", "lighting": {"conditions": "Bright, clear high-altitude midday sunlight under a cloudless sky.", "direction": "Sun high in the sky and slightly to the camera-left, illuminating the right faces of the peaks.", "shadows": "Long, defined shadows on the left flanks of the peaks; From 2.5 to 5.0 seconds, the camera continues its measured forward approach, gradually bringing the peaks closer and revealing more detail in the snow patterns and rock faces; the mist continues to shift gently, the canopy continues its slow rustle, and the overall composition retains its sense of grandeur and stillness through to the end of the clip."}

name: cat

rear left paw swings forward; torso lowers slightly; tail flicks for balance.", "camera": "Low, near-static with slight forward drift, telephoto, shallow depth of field"}], "transitions": [], "temporal_caption": "The scene opens with a low-angle, telephoto close-up of a small wild cat — lean, spotted, with reddish-grey fur — frozen in a low-slung stalking crouch on pale, sun-drenched sand, with a wall of softly blurred green foliage forming the background.
